# SPARQL POST with x-www-form-urlencoded query
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: structural-json
description: POST /sparql with form-encoded query body returns JSON

=== request
POST /sparql
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Accept: application/sparql-results+json

query=SELECT%20%2A%20WHERE%20%7B%20%3Fs%20%3Fp%20%3Fo%20%7D%20LIMIT%200

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/sparql-results+json

{"head":{"vars":[]},"results":{"bindings":[]}}
